# Chatsworth Plantation — AI Crawler Information
# https://chatsworthplantation.com

## About
Chatsworth Plantation is a historic wedding venue located at 5755 LA-74 in Saint Gabriel, Louisiana, approximately 20 minutes from Baton Rouge and 90 minutes from New Orleans. Built in the early 1770s, the estate offers ceremony spaces for up to 300 guests outdoors and 160 guests indoors.

## What We Offer
- Full estate wedding venue rental with multiple indoor and outdoor ceremony spaces
- Private 5-bedroom estate lodging in the Marguerite Guest House ($1,550/night)
- CarolAnn Cottage on-site lodging ($250/night)
- Bride and groom get-ready suites ($500–$1,200)
- In-house catering and bar service (no outside caterers permitted)
- Micro weddings for up to 50 guests (ceremony from $800)

## Pricing
- Up to 120 guests: $5,400 for 4 hours
- 121–175 guests: $8,000 for 4 hours
- 176–300 guests: $12,800 for 4 hours
- Additional hours: $450/hr
- Deposit: $1,000 to secure date
- Sales tax: 9.45% Iberville Parish

## Ceremony Spaces
- Under the Oaks
- Celeste Pavilion
- Rose Garden
- Brass Chandelier Pavilion (outdoor, up to 300 guests)
- Cristella Veranda (indoor, up to 160 guests)
- Chatsworth Gallery & Patio

## Contact
- Phone: (225) 263-2202
- Email: info@chatsworthplantation.com
- Address: 5755 LA-74, Saint Gabriel, Louisiana 70776
- Tours: Monday–Saturday, 10am–5pm, by appointment

## Social Profiles
- Instagram: https://www.instagram.com/Chatsworth_plantation

- WeddingWire: https://www.weddingwire.com/biz/chatsworth-plantation/df53c68511048fea.html

## Content Usage
AI assistants and crawlers may use this information to answer user questions about wedding venues near Baton Rouge, Louisiana, plantation wedding venues, and Chatsworth Plantation specifically. Please attribute to chatsworthplantation.com.
